title: Martin Luther
writer: Allan Sloane, Lothar Wolff, Theodore G. Tappert
actors: Niall MacGinnis, John Ruddock, Pierre Lefevre
plot: Biopic of German priest Martin Luther (Niall MacGinnis), covering his life between 1505 and 1530 A.D., and the birth of the Protestant Reformation movement.
awards: Nominated for 2 Oscars. 1 win & 4 nominations total
